mapper.select: SELECT sa.id, u.user_id, up.name AS staff_name, sa.attend_date, sa.check_in, sa.check_out, sa.memo, sa.created_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN staff_attendance sa ON sa.user_id = u.user_id AND sa.attend_date = #{today} WHERE u.role = 'TRAINER' AND u.is_active = 1 ORDER BY up.name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO staff_attendance (user_id, attend_date, check_in, memo) VALUES (#{userId}, #{attendDate}, #{checkIn}, #{memo}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE check_in = COALESCE(#{checkIn}, check_in), memo = COALESCE(#{memo}, memo)
mapper.update: UPDATE staff_attendance SET check_out = #{checkOut} WHERE id = #{id}
